title: himantoglossum anthropophorum
intro: Himantoglossum anthropophorum, also known as the Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a rare and perennial orchid species native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and treat various gastrointestinal issues, thanks to its high content of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The Autumn Lady's Tresses has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and nausea, making it a sought-after remedy in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and teas, which are often used to promote healthy digestion and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.
